props.ChoiceText: You gave sentence before anyone could truly know enough, because the room demanded obedience faster than truth could arrive.
props.ChoiceBio: Sentence before certainty taught you how zeal can demand obedience before truth has finished speaking.

0.TransitionText: Because judgment under pressure taught you how public certainty can conceal private doubt, you stayed in the same hard office, now with fewer certainties.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Inquisitioner, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because judgment under pressure taught you how public certainty can conceal private doubt, you learned how much authority depends on performance before witnesses.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because judgment under pressure taught you how public certainty can conceal private doubt, you were drawn toward institutions that still speak in absolutes.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.
